item.title: Several potholes caused by removal of cats eyes, 2nd April
item.description:
Several potholes on the southbound a345 leading up to the racecourse roundabout. Caused by the removal of cats eyes during the recent construction projects. Most of them have been patched, but several have been missed, right in the middle of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No entry sign faded and peeling, 2nd April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Potholes caused by deterioration of poor quality patching, 2nd April
item.description:
Several potholes opened on the southound side of a345 caused by the deterioration of poor quality tarmac patches created during the recent construction works.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole when exiting roundabout caused by poor tarmac patching, 2nd April
item.description:
When exiting the GE roundabout heading south onto Cheltenham road, there is a pothole that's opened in the road caused by deterioration of poor-quality patching created during the recent construction works.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 2nd April
item.description:
Abrupt level difference FW. Post has been removed but has left abrupt level. Is 10mm and not at intervention level but has sharp edges so presents as a safety defect. Please remove and replace with concrete. Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 2nd April
item.description:
Damaged Bollard (Make Safe with arrow boards). TM: Give and Take 2 Hr Emergency Slippers.worry.swims (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please consider removing New Road layout ahead sign, 2nd April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 105, Promenade, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Potholes in road, 2nd April
item.description:
Several potholes have developed along Whitelands Lane, with some deeper than a hockey ball. This has become a persistent issue, likely due to ongoing water accumulation around the nearby tree. Could a local highways manager assesses this stretch of road, as the issue appears to be ongoing and may require more than temporary repairs. Drivers attempting to avoid the potholes are mounting the grass verges, which is causing further damage to the surrounding area and worsening the situation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitelands Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
